top_critical.title: CVE-2026-56645: Microsoft Edge RCE Vulnerability
top_critical.summary: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in Microsoft Edge (Chromium-based) allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code remotely over a network. This type of flaw can be exploited w
top_critical.architects_take: Prioritise rapid patching of Microsoft Edge across all endpoints, with particular urgency for privileged users and those accessing Azure or other cloud consoles — consider enforcing browser version compliance via Intune or equivalent MDM tooling until patched versions are confirmed deployed.
